turns.user_message: My chest feels tight lately, like I can't get a full breath. It's just a weird physical thing that started.
This tightness keeps coming back and makes my heart race out of nowhere. I feel it even when I'm trying to relax.
I'm constantly on edge waiting for that crushing feeling in my chest to hit. It's like my body is betraying me.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling. This just started recently.
